title: Jungle Surge
description: Blaze through lush tropical jungles as Koa, a fearless jungle guardian, in this fast-paced 2D platformer. Dash through vine-covered ruins, bounce off enemy heads, collect ancient crystals, and defeat the invading Frost Clan. With momentum-based movement, wall jumps, ground pounds, and 3 unique worlds, Jungle Surge delivers classic platforming thrills with modern precision.
short_description: Fast-paced tropical platformer. Dash, jump, and ground-pound through 3 worlds!
controls_keyboard: Arrow keys / WASD to move. Space to jump (hold for higher). Down+Space for ground pound. Shift to dash.
controls_gamepad: Left stick to move. A to jump. B to dash. Down+A for ground pound.

characters.protagonist: Koa - jungle guardian, agile and quick
characters.villain: Lord Cryo - leader of the Frost Clan

worlds: Emerald Canopy - lush treetops and vine swings
Crystal Caverns - underground with glowing crystals
Frozen Summit - ice and snow, Frost Clan stronghold
